basics.name: Aryan Ghate
basics.summary: AI & ML Engineering student who builds systems from scratch — from Redis clones to bootable kernels.

work.summary: Built AI-driven marketing systems with predictive models, NLP-based feedback analysis, and ran 50+ A/B tests on AI-generated content.
highlights: Lifted engagement by 35% and satisfaction by 40% through automated segmentation
Raised retention by 30% via NLP-based personalized recommendations
Uncovered 15 viable AI features improving click-through by 20%

portfolio.name: Flux DB
portfolio.description: Redis-inspired key-value store in C++17 with zero dependencies. 110k-150k ops/sec.

portfolio.name: x86 Bootable Kernel
portfolio.description: Bare-metal x86 kernel in C/Assembly with VGA rendering via GRUB Multiboot.

portfolio.name: TCP Chat Server
portfolio.description: Concurrent multi-room chat server in Golang with channel-driven command processing.
